---
pagetitle: "Public Finance · Fiscal Policy · Data"
description: "Gonzalo Llamosas-García, Assistant Professor in Public Finance at the University of Málaga. Research on fiscal policy, public debt and behavioural economics."
keywords: "Gonzalo Llamosas, Gonzalo Llamosas García, public finance, fiscal policy, University of Málaga, UMA, behavioural economics, fiscal consolidation, public debt EU, ANECA, Hacienda Pública, profesor ayudante doctor, economista España"
author: "Gonzalo Llamosas-García"
page-layout: full
title-block-style: none
---

```{=html}
<section class="hero-block">
  <div class="hero-text">
    <h1>Hi, I'm <span class="accent">Gonzalo</span>.</h1>

    <p class="hero-lead">
      I am <strong>Assistant Professor in Public Finance</strong> at the
      <a href="https://www.uma.es" target="_blank">University of Málaga</a>,
      accredited by ANECA as Associate Professor.
    </p>

    <p class="hero-lead">
      My research sits at the intersection of <strong>fiscal policy</strong>,
      <strong>behavioural economics</strong> and <strong>data</strong>, with growing
      attention to how artificial intelligence is reshaping the tax base of
      advanced economies.
    </p>

    <p class="hero-lead">
      I currently work on the effects of fiscal consolidation on public debt
      sustainability in the EU-27, on the design of financial-education policies,
      and on how human decisions interact with fiscal-policy outcomes. My recent
      work has appeared in the
      <em>Journal of Behavioral and Experimental Economics</em> (2025) and
      <em>Global Policy</em> (2020).
    </p>

    <p class="hero-lead">
      Outside academia, I host <a href="outlook-project.html"><strong>Outlook Project</strong></a>,
      a YouTube channel on economics, data and human decisions.
    </p>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-image">
    <img src="images/profile.jpg" alt="Gonzalo Llamosas-García, Assistant Professor in Public Finance at the University of Málaga" loading="eager">
  </div>
</section>

<div class="wave-separator">
  <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1200 200" preserveAspectRatio="none" fill="none">
    <path d="M 0 70 C 150 30, 300 110, 450 70 S 750 30, 900 70 S 1200 110, 1350 70" stroke="#D9A12C" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M 0 90 C 150 50, 300 130, 450 90 S 750 50, 900 90 S 1200 130, 1350 90" stroke="#D9A12C" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M 0 110 C 150 70, 300 150, 450 110 S 750 70, 900 110 S 1200 150, 1350 110" stroke="#D9A12C" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M 0 130 C 150 90, 300 170, 450 130 S 750 90, 900 130 S 1200 170, 1350 130" stroke="#D9A12C" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M 0 150 C 150 110, 300 190, 450 150 S 750 110, 900 150 S 1200 190, 1350 150" stroke="#D9A12C" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </svg>
</div>
```

::: {.news-section}
## News

- **2026** · Working paper *"Does Fiscal Consolidation Reduce Public Debt? Evidence from the EU-27"* (with Cristina Mazas Pérez-Oleaga and José M. Domínguez Martínez) — see [Research](research.qmd).
- **2025** · Published *"What Works in Financial Education? Experimental Evidence on Program Impact"* in [*Journal of Behavioral and Experimental Economics*](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.socec.2025.102401), Vol. 119 (Q1).
- **2026** · Serving as reviewer for the *Journal of Behavioral and Experimental Economics*.
- **Coming soon** · Launching [**Outlook Project**](outlook-project.qmd), a YouTube channel on economics, data and human decisions. First episode out in May 2026.
:::

## En español

> *Soy profesor ayudante doctor en Hacienda Pública en la Universidad de Málaga, acreditado por ANECA como profesor contratado doctor. Mi investigación combina política fiscal, economía conductual y datos, con atención creciente al impacto de la inteligencia artificial sobre la base fiscal de las economías avanzadas.*
